resources.name: ARTBITRAGE — art catalogue & data distributor
resources.what: Open REST catalogue of art: curated journeys, AI-art studio, and a no-key search bridge into museum APIs (Met, Art Institute of Chicago, Cleveland, Wikimedia). JSON, no auth. Start at /api/manifest for the full route map.
resources.blurb: art is the arbitrage between what is and what could be. the catalogue is open — drink freely.

resources.name: REST Countries
resources.what: Names, capitals, currencies, flags, borders for every country as JSON. No key.
resources.blurb: the whole world's facts in one ungated endpoint.

resources.name: World Bank Open Data API
resources.what: Global development indicators — population, GDP, life expectancy and thousands more — as JSON. No key.
resources.blurb: the planet's development data, ungated. swap USA for any country, or query 16k+ indicators.
